summary: The correction in dry bulk is here as spot rates look for a bottom - Although the excitement in dry bulk shipping Chinese economic data shows signs of recovery, but steel markets remain depressed - Recent economic data out Our long-term view - The last few years have been characterized by increased geopolitical uncertainty.
